title: Silver Edition
description: Minecraft in a new vein: Deeper exploration, re-designed core systems, new progression and widely expanded game-play options.
body:
![Title Silver Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08d5225af1657d785bebb81fdb8208d97718004.png)

## What is Silver Edition?
- Minecraft had the potential to be something different, and its time to experience it in a whole new vein... (Silver to be exact.) Silver Edition is a re-imagining of what minecraft can be.
 
- Gone are the days of artifical QOL, graphics, vanilla plus and massive expansions. It's time to bring a unique and subjective change to what modpacks are.
 
- Uniquely overhauled and expanded core systems: Deeper exploration, no sleeping or hunger, dungeons, new ores, expanded redstone, modified combat, harder mobs and much more! It's Minecraft from an alternate reality.

## ![Silver Edition Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3f17c8e657924975e0d06fddd51b249855d4ee1.png)
### Feature list was majorly out of date, currently re-doing for next release! (Next release is in the works, 5 months since last release)
